addon:addon.name: Rachio Binding
addon:addon.description: This is the binding for Rachio Sprinkler Controller.

parameter.name: apikey
parameter.label: Rachio API Key
parameter.description: Deprecated fallback only. Configure the API token on the Rachio Cloud Connector Thing. Legacy binding-level values are used only when the Thing value is absent.

parameter.name: pollingInterval
parameter.label: Polling/Refresh Interval
parameter.description: Deprecated fallback only. Configure the polling interval on the Rachio Cloud Connector Thing.

parameter.name: defaultRuntime
parameter.label: Default Runtime
parameter.description: Deprecated fallback only. Configure the default runtime on the Rachio Cloud Connector Thing.

parameter.name: eventHistoryLookbackHours
parameter.label: Event History Lookback
parameter.description: Deprecated fallback only. Configure the event history lookback on the Rachio Cloud Connector Thing.

parameter.name: forecastUnits
parameter.label: Forecast Units
parameter.description: Deprecated fallback only. Configure forecast units on the Rachio Cloud Connector Thing.

parameter.name: hoseSummaryLookbackDays
parameter.label: Hose Timer Summary Lookback
parameter.description: Deprecated fallback only. Configure the summary lookback on the Rachio Cloud Connector Thing.

parameter.name: hoseSummaryLookaheadDays
parameter.label: Hose Timer Summary Lookahead
parameter.description: Deprecated fallback only. Configure the summary lookahead on the Rachio Cloud Connector Thing.

parameter.name: callbackUrl
parameter.label: Callback URL
parameter.description: Deprecated fallback only. Configure the callback URL on the Rachio Cloud Connector Thing.

parameter.name: callbackUsername
parameter.label: Callback Username
parameter.description: Deprecated fallback only. Configure the callback username on the Rachio Cloud Connector Thing.

parameter.name: callbackPassword
parameter.label: Callback Password
parameter.description: Deprecated fallback only. Configure the callback password on the Rachio Cloud Connector Thing.

parameter.name: clearAllCallbacks
parameter.label: Clear Callbacks
parameter.description: Deprecated fallback only. Configure callback cleanup on the Rachio Cloud Connector Thing.
